source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Familial adenomatous polyposis is inherited in an {{c1::autosomal dominant}} pattern.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Familial adenomatous polyposis features innumerable {{c1::premalignant adenomatous polyps}} in the colon.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: In familial adenomatous polyposis, adenomatous polyps also occur to a lesser extent in the {{c1::small bowel}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: The lifetime colon cancer risk in familial adenomatous polyposis approaches {{c1::100%}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: The average age for colon cancer development in familial adenomatous polyposis is about {{c1::39 years}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Standard colon cancer prevention in familial adenomatous polyposis is {{c1::prophylactic colectomy}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Gastric polyps in familial adenomatous polyposis are usually {{c1::hyperplastic}} and are {{c2::not premalignant}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Gardner syndrome is a variant of {{c1::familial adenomatous polyposis}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Gardner syndrome adds {{c1::desmoid tumors, osteomas, papillary thyroid cancer, and epidermoid cysts}} to colon polyps in FAP.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: The mnemonic for Gardner syndrome extracolonic findings is {{c1::DOPE Gardner}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: In the Gardner syndrome mnemonic, DOPE stands for {{c1::desmoid tumors, osteomas, papillary thyroid cancer, and epidermoid cysts}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Turcot syndrome is a variant of {{c1::familial adenomatous polyposis}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Turcot syndrome adds {{c1::CNS tumors}} to colon polyps in FAP.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: The CNS tumors associated with Turcot syndrome include {{c1::gliomas and medulloblastomas}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: The mnemonic for Turcot syndrome is {{c1::TURbans go over your head}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text:
Most likely diagnosis on this coronal CT?

{{c1::familial adenomatous polyposis}}
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Lynch syndrome is also called {{c1::hereditary nonpolyposis colon cancer syndrome}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Hereditary nonpolyposis colon cancer syndrome is caused by {{c1::DNA mismatch repair defects}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Hereditary nonpolyposis colon cancer syndrome causes colon cancer through {{c1::microsatellite instability}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: The colon cancer risk in hereditary nonpolyposis colon cancer syndrome is {{c1::less than in FAP}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Colon polyps in hereditary nonpolyposis colon cancer syndrome are {{c1::adenomatous}}, similar to FAP.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.

source_title: Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel

fields.Text: Hereditary nonpolyposis colon cancer syndrome is associated with {{c1::endometrial, gastric, small bowel, liver, and biliary malignancies}}.
fields.Extra:
Source Core Radiology 2nd ed, GI: 221, Polyposis syndromes affecting the bowel.
Full source page for context.
